name: Prawns Hunan Style
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon white wine up to 2 tablespoons
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind ginger, garlic, green onions, and green hot pepper to a paste. Set aside.
2. Reduce the chicken stock and soy sauce to 2 cups. This will take about 10-15 minutes.
3. Season with white pepper and add sesame oil.
4. Thicken the mixture using cornstarch dissolved in water (up to 3 teaspoons).
5. Heat the peanut oil until very hot.
6. Lightly dust the shrimp with flour and cook for 2-3 minutes in the hot oil.
7. Add the vegetables for another minute. Do not overcook; they are mostly for color.
8. Remove from heat using a lid to drain excess oil.
9. Add the paste, cooking until lightly browned.
10. Finish with a splash or two of white wine (up to 2 tablespoons).
